overall.description: Gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 featuring an Ultramarine in blue power armor exploring a dark gothic industrial hangar and ritual chamber. The character moves from an observation balcony down to the hangar floor, inspects a large tank with squad mates, traverses dark corridors, and interacts with a tech-console in a candle-lit circular chamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated observation balcony overlooking industrial hangar

events.description: character turns from facing the hangar to walk along the balcony
character drops down from balcony to ground level of the hangar

agents.ego_description: standing on an observation balcony overlooking the vast industrial complex, then moving to descend to the floor below

notable_agents.action: fellow Space Marine standing guard facing the hangar
fellow Space Marine standing guard with weapon ready

entered.detail: ornate gothic metal railing with skull decorations along the balcony edge
vast industrial complex with distant red lights and massive structures
yellow glowing industrial lanterns mounted on the walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated balcony overlooking a massive industrial hangar. Two fellow Space Marines stand guard as the character observes the complex below, then moves along the balcony and drops down to the ground level.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial hangar floor with heavy vehicle parking

events.description: lands on metal grating floor, entering the main hangar area
approaches and circles around the large blue tank vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking across the metal grating floor toward a large armored vehicle, joining other squad members

notable_agents.action: Space Marine standing near the tank facing the character
Space Marine standing guard near the tank treads

entered.detail: large blue super-heavy tank with number 101 and white eagle insignia on the side
large circular metal grate embedded in the floor

segments.scene_description: Now on the hangar floor, the character walks across metal grating toward a massive blue tank marked with 101. Other Space Marines stand nearby as the character approaches and examines the vehicle in the dimly lit industrial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial maintenance corridor with red warning lights

events.description: entering darker corridor section illuminated by red warning lights
approaching the entrance to a large circular chamber with visible candlelight

agents.ego_description: moving through darker corridors with red ambient lighting, following the path toward the objective marker

notable_agents.action: Space Marine walking ahead in the corridor toward the chamber

entered.detail: vertical industrial lights emitting red glow along the corridor walls
massive industrial pipes running along the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open hangar into narrower, darker corridors illuminated by red warning lights. Large industrial pipes line the walls as the character follows a squad mate toward a distant chamber entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular ritual chamber with concentric candle rings and central tech-shrine

events.description: enters the grand circular chamber with ritual candle arrangements and tech-priests
approaches and interacts with the central console to receive objective update

agents.ego_description: walking through the candle-lit chamber and approaching the central console to interact with the tech-priest

notable_agents.action: tech-priest in red robes working at the console with mechanical arms
Space Marine standing guard near the tech-shrine

entered.detail: concentric rings of lit candles on the floor creating a ritualistic atmosphere
cluster of green-screen monitors and mechanical equipment with cables
tall ornate pillars supporting the chamber ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast circular chamber illuminated by rings of candles. Tech-priests in red robes tend to a central console with glowing green screens. The character approaches the console and interacts with it while other Space Marines stand guard.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular ritual chamber moving toward exit corridor

events.description: turns away from console and begins walking back toward the chamber entrance

agents.ego_description: turning away from the console after interaction and walking back through the chamber toward the exit

entered.detail: dark corridor leading back out of the ritual chamber

segments.scene_description: After interacting with the console, the character turns and walks away from the tech-shrine, moving back through the candle-lit chamber toward the exit corridor. Other figures in red robes remain stationed around the perimeter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated industrial vantage point down into the depths of a gothic ritual chamber. It begins on a high balcony overlooking a massive hangar, where the character observes the complex before dropping down to the metal grating of the ground level. As the camera moves across the hangar floor to examine a massive blue tank marked 101, the open industrial space shifts into narrower, darker corridors lined with pipes and pulsing red warning lights. The scene then expands into a vast circular chamber illuminated by rings of candles and glowing green screens, where the character interacts with a central console tended by red-robed tech-priests. Finally, the camera pulls away from the tech-shrine, retreating through the candle-lit hall and back toward the exit corridor.
